thesis_hint: Explore a new concept this cycle. Recent journal history is still over-concentrated in ETH/VVV exploit loops, 1h work (6 of last 10), and 4h continuation/reclaim batches (4 of last 10), so rotate to a different asset, timeframe, and structure. This is not a washout reclaim, not a snapback fade, not ETH failed-continuation inversion, and not another 4h staircase continuation batch.
